title: feat: add gpt-5.5 on azure swedencentral
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: GPT-5.5 joins the hive
gist.blurb: We just wired up GPT-5.5 to the text endpoint. Get ready for next-level reasoning, massive context windows, and flawless tool calling.
gist.summary: Added OpenAI's new GPT-5.5 model to the text generation API, deployed via Azure with full support for reasoning and tool-calling.
gist.impact: Developers can now access the `gpt-5.5` model through the standard text endpoint for advanced reasoning and vision tasks.
gist.visual_concept: The addition of a highly advanced reasoning model (GPT-5.5). Visualized as a glowing, powerful new server or 'brain' core being installed. The bee and monitor robot are excited about the new upgrade.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny wizard glasses and the chunky monitor robot marveling at a glowing, futuristic server rack emitting soft lime green (#ecf874) light. The robot's screen shows a glowing brain icon. Soft pastel gradient background with lavender and mint. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'GPT-5.5'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny wizard glasses and the chunky monitor robot marveling at a glowing, futuristic server rack emitting soft lime green (#ecf874) light. The robot's screen shows a glowing brain icon. Soft pastel gradient background with lavender and mint. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'GPT-5.5'.
